**Analyzing upcoming strike details**

I'm looking at an upcoming general strike on June 20, 2025, which will last for 24 hours as per the information I have. The article mentions that services are guaranteed until 8:30 AM and from 5 PM to 8 PM. Based on this, I should note that the strike will likely start at midnight on that Friday. So I’ll need to extract the strike dates in the format “yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss,” ensuring the strike status is true.
